name: Bonus por velocidad
description: Otorga 10 puntos (caso SpeedBonus) cuando el tiempo medio del usuario es claramente inferior al de la media global (user.avg_time < all.avg_time * 0.8). Recompensa el desempeño rápido sin disparar falsos positivos.
blocklyXml: <xml xmlns="https://developers.google.com/blockly/xml"><block type="gd_rule" id="rule_speed" x="40" y="40"><value name="WHEN"><block type="gd_compare" id="cmp_speed"><field name="OP"><</field><value name="LEFT"><block type="gd_field" id="f_user_avg"><field name="PATH">user.avg_time</field></block></value><value name="RIGHT"><block type="gd_arith" id="arith_threshold"><field name="OP">*</field><value name="LEFT"><block type="gd_field" id="f_all_avg"><field name="PATH">all.avg_time</field></block></value><value name="RIGHT"><block type="gd_literal_number" id="lit_factor"><field name="VALUE">0.8</field></block></value></block></value></block></value><statement name="THEN"><block type="gd_assign_points" id="assign_speed"><value name="VALUE"><block type="gd_literal_number" id="lit_ten"><field name="VALUE">10</field></block></value><field name="CASE_NAME">SpeedBonus</field></block></statement></block></xml>
